notes: Inbox-focused mapping: HubSpot Solutions (RevOps, CRM migrations, Service Hub, Sales Enablement, Custom Attribution) + Inbound/Advertising/Deliverability.
Uses byCategoryId/byGroupId for stable keys we already know from this dataset; uses names for everything else.

WordPress.title: Migrate from WordPress to HubSpot Content Hub
WordPress.reason: Move the website onto HubSpot for CRM-connected content, reporting, and easier marketing iteration.
WordPress.inboxOffer: Website migration + custom modules + landing pages

WordPress.com.title: Evaluate moving the site from WordPress.com to HubSpot Content Hub
WordPress.com.reason: HubSpot can unify site + marketing + CRM data in one system.

Google Analytics.title: Unify reporting & attribution in HubSpot (and reduce tool sprawl)
Google Analytics.reason: If your goal is closed-loop reporting tied to CRM lifecycle stages, HubSpot reporting can simplify your stack.

Google Tag Manager.title: Audit tag governance and consolidate tracking where possible
Google Tag Manager.reason: Reduce duplicate tags and improve data quality by standardizing your tracking approach.
Google Tag Manager.inboxOffer: Tracking plan + GTM cleanup + HubSpot tracking alignment

Google Ads.title: Connect ads to CRM outcomes with HubSpot Ads + attribution
Google Ads.reason: Tie spend to lifecycle stages and revenue reporting inside HubSpot.

Google Ads Conversion Tracking.title: Improve conversion tracking and attribution inside HubSpot
Google Ads Conversion Tracking.reason: Better aligns conversion events with CRM outcomes and reporting.

Mailchimp.title: Replace Mailchimp with HubSpot Email + Automation
Mailchimp.reason: Consolidate email marketing, segmentation, and automation with CRM-native data.
Mailchimp.inboxOffer: Email migration + automation rebuild + deliverability support

Klaviyo.title: Evaluate consolidating lifecycle email into HubSpot
Klaviyo.reason: If CRM-driven personalization and unified reporting is the goal, HubSpot can reduce fragmentation.

Intercom.title: Replace Intercom with HubSpot Service Hub (Conversations + Tickets)
Intercom.reason: Unify chat, inbox, tickets, and customer context directly in HubSpot.
Intercom.inboxOffer: Service Hub setup + workflow automation + migration

Zendesk.title: Migrate ticketing to HubSpot Service Hub
Zendesk.reason: Centralize support data alongside CRM and automate support workflows.

Salesforce.title: Assess CRM migration to HubSpot
Salesforce.reason: If you want simpler CRM operations + marketing/sales alignment, HubSpot can be a strong consolidation move.

HubSpot.title: Optimize your HubSpot portal with RevOps + automation
HubSpot.hubspotProduct: RevOps / Marketing Hub / Sales Hub / Service Hub
HubSpot.reason: If HubSpot is already present, there is usually significant upside from portal cleanup, lifecycle alignment, and automation strategy.
HubSpot.inboxOffer: Revenue Operations + custom attribution systems + workflow architecture

1.title: Consider HubSpot Content Hub for your CMS
1.reason: CMS detected — HubSpot Content Hub can unify website + CRM + marketing reporting.

11.title: Consolidate blog + lead capture into HubSpot
11.reason: If blogging is a growth channel, HubSpot can unify content, CTAs, forms, and reporting.

10.title: Implement HubSpot-first analytics + attribution
10.reason: Analytics category detected — Inbox builds custom attribution systems and reporting inside HubSpot.

42.title: Audit tag management and tracking architecture
42.reason: Tag manager detected — reduce duplication and improve governance.
42.inboxOffer: Tracking plan + tag governance + measurement framework

62.title: Align hosting/platform decisions with HubSpot website strategy
62.reason: PaaS detected — if the site is marketing-led, HubSpot Content Hub may simplify deployment and reporting.

CRM.title: Centralize customer data and lifecycle stages in HubSpot CRM
CRM.reason: CRM tooling detected — consolidate core objects, properties, and lifecycle logic in HubSpot.
CRM.inboxOffer: CRM design + data model + portal setup

Customer support.title: Unify customer support in HubSpot Service Hub
Customer support.reason: Support tooling detected — consolidate tickets, SLAs, and reporting inside HubSpot.

Live chat.title: Standardize chat + lead routing using HubSpot Conversations
Live chat.reason: Chat tooling detected — unify inbox, routing, and contact context in HubSpot.

Forms.title: Move forms and lead capture into HubSpot
Forms.reason: Forms detected — HubSpot forms can simplify routing, segmentation, and reporting.
Forms.inboxOffer: Form strategy + conversion optimization + routing workflows

A/B Testing.title: Use HubSpot to run conversion-focused experiments
A/B Testing.reason: Testing tools detected — unify landing pages, CTAs, and reporting within HubSpot where possible.

Advertising.title: Connect ads to CRM outcomes in HubSpot
Advertising.reason: Advertising category detected — HubSpot can connect spend to pipeline outcomes.

Email marketing.title: Consolidate lifecycle email into HubSpot
Email marketing.reason: Email marketing detected — HubSpot simplifies segmentation, automation, and reporting tied to CRM.

Marketing automation.title: Rebuild automation workflows inside HubSpot
Marketing automation.reason: Automation tooling detected — HubSpot workflows can centralize lifecycle automation.

Sales enablement.title: Implement HubSpot Sales Hub enablement
Sales enablement.reason: Sales enablement tooling detected — HubSpot sequences, playbooks, and pipelines improve adoption and consistency.

3.title: Unify content + lead capture with HubSpot Content Hub
3.reason: Content group detected — HubSpot unifies pages, CTAs, forms, and reporting.

8.title: Build HubSpot-first reporting and attribution
8.reason: Analytics group detected — Inbox specializes in HubSpot attribution and reporting.

7.title: Align platform decisions with HubSpot website + CRM strategy
7.reason: Servers group detected — if marketing-led, consolidating onto HubSpot can reduce maintenance overhead.

6.title: Review miscellaneous tools for consolidation opportunities
6.reason: Misc tooling often indicates stack sprawl; HubSpot can consolidate common needs.

Marketing.title: Build an integrated HubSpot marketing system
Marketing.reason: Marketing tooling detected — HubSpot can consolidate tracking, automation, and reporting.

Sales.title: Enable the sales team with HubSpot Sales Hub
Sales.reason: Sales tooling detected — standardize pipelines, playbooks, sequences, and reporting.

Communication.title: Unify conversations and routing in HubSpot
Communication.reason: Communication tooling detected — HubSpot can centralize inbox/chat/tickets tied to CRM.
